MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar May-15-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: SVETLANA RISHINA, ESQ., 510.299.5346, FOR PLAINTIFF WESTERN PROPERTY ADVISORS, INC.
MAX MIZONO, ESQ., 415.881.7774, FOR DEFENDANTs L.F. GEORGE PROPERTIES CORP, JUDAH TERRACES LLC, 6901 GEARY BLVD LLC, GEORGE LAM.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs L.F. GEORGE PROPERTIES CORP, JUDAH TERRACES LLC, 6901 GEARY BLVD LLC, GEORGE LAM's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is denied. Defendants seek relief from default on the grounds that George Lam does not speak English fluently, and therefore did not realize he was being sued until his assistant returned to work and translated the documents. Yet, the only evidence submitted in opposition is a declaration from Mr. Lam written in English. No translator's oath is submitted, as required by Evidence Code sec. 751(c). As such, there is no credible evidence that would justify setting aside the default under CCP 473(b). Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Joyce Finley #8620.

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Apr-10-2014 Continued To May-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS L.F. GEORGE PROPERTIES CORP, JUDAH TERRACES LLC, 6901 GEARY BLVD LLC and GEORGE LAM'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is continued to May 15, 2014 as courtesy copies were not received in time to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
